canonical_parameterized_cypher: MATCH (:Company {name: $company})-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:BusinessSegment) RETURN DISTINCT s.name AS segment ORDER BY segment
synthetic_fixture_requirements: at least one HAS_SEGMENT edge from the company to a BusinessSegment

slot_pattern: How many business segments does [Company] have?
canonical_parameterized_cypher: MATCH (:Company {name: $company})-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:BusinessSegment) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT s) AS segment_count
synthetic_fixture_requirements: at least one HAS_SEGMENT edge from the company to a BusinessSegment

slot_pattern: What direct offerings does [Company]'s [BusinessSegment] segment have?
canonical_parameterized_cypher: MATCH (:Company {name: $company})-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(:BusinessSegment {name: $segment})-[:OFFERS]->(o:Offering) RETURN DISTINCT o.name AS offering ORDER BY offering

result_shape.description: Direct offering name attached to the segment

synthetic_fixture_requirements: at least one direct OFFERS edge from the segment to an Offering

slot_pattern: How many direct offerings does [Company]'s [BusinessSegment] segment have?
canonical_parameterized_cypher: MATCH (:Company {name: $company})-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(:BusinessSegment {name: $segment})-[:OFFERS]->(o:Offering) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT o) AS offering_count

result_shape.description: Number of distinct direct offerings for the segment

synthetic_fixture_requirements: at least one direct OFFERS edge from the segment to an Offering

slot_pattern: List up to [Limit] direct offerings for [Company]'s [BusinessSegment] segment.
canonical_parameterized_cypher: MATCH (:Company {name: $company})-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(:BusinessSegment {name: $segment})-[:OFFERS]->(o:Offering) RETURN DISTINCT o.name AS offering ORDER BY offering LIMIT $limit

result_shape.description: Direct offering name attached to the segment

synthetic_fixture_requirements: at least one direct OFFERS edge from the segment to an Offering

slot_pattern: Which customer types does [Company]'s [BusinessSegment] segment serve?
canonical_parameterized_cypher: MATCH (:Company {name: $company})-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(:BusinessSegment {name: $segment})-[:SERVES]->(c:CustomerType) RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS customer_type ORDER BY customer_type
synthetic_fixture_requirements: at least one SERVES edge from the segment to a canonical CustomerType

slot_pattern: How many customer types does [Company]'s [BusinessSegment] segment serve?
canonical_parameterized_cypher: MATCH (:Company {name: $company})-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(:BusinessSegment {name: $segment})-[:SERVES]->(c:CustomerType) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS customer_type_count

result_shape.description: Number of distinct canonical customer types

synthetic_fixture_requirements: at least one SERVES edge from the segment to a canonical CustomerType

slot_pattern: Which channels does [Company]'s [BusinessSegment] segment sell through?
canonical_parameterized_cypher: MATCH (:Company {name: $company})-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(:BusinessSegment {name: $segment})-[:SELLS_THROUGH]->(ch:Channel) RETURN DISTINCT ch.name AS channel ORDER BY channel
synthetic_fixture_requirements: at least one SELLS_THROUGH edge from the segment to a canonical Channel

slot_pattern: How many channels does [Company]'s [BusinessSegment] segment sell through?
canonical_parameterized_cypher: MATCH (:Company {name: $company})-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(:BusinessSegment {name: $segment})-[:SELLS_THROUGH]->(ch:Channel) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT ch) AS channel_count
synthetic_fixture_requirements: at least one SELLS_THROUGH edge from the segment to a canonical Channel

canonical_parameterized_cypher: MATCH (o:Offering {name: $offering})-[:MONETIZES_VIA]->(r:RevenueModel) RETURN DISTINCT r.name AS revenue_model ORDER BY revenue_model
synthetic_fixture_requirements: at least one MONETIZES_VIA edge from the offering to a canonical RevenueModel

slot_pattern: How many revenue models does [Offering] use?
canonical_parameterized_cypher: MATCH (o:Offering {name: $offering})-[:MONETIZES_VIA]->(r:RevenueModel) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT r) AS revenue_model_count

result_shape.description: Number of distinct canonical revenue models for the offering

synthetic_fixture_requirements: at least one MONETIZES_VIA edge from the offering to a canonical RevenueModel

result_shape.description: Whether the offering uses the given revenue model

synthetic_fixture_requirements: at least one MONETIZES_VIA edge from the offering to a canonical RevenueModel

canonical_parameterized_cypher: MATCH (:Company {name: $company})-[:HAS_SEGMENT]->(s:BusinessSegment {name: $segment})-[:OFFERS]->(root:Offering) MATCH (root)-[:OFFERS*0..]->(o:Offering) MATCH (o)-[:MONETIZES_VIA]->(r:RevenueModel) RETURN DISTINCT r.name AS revenue_model ORDER BY revenue_model

result_shape.description: Canonical revenue model recovered from descendant offerings

synthetic_fixture_requirements: at least one direct OFFERS edge from the segment to a root Offering
a valid descendant traversal via OFFERS*0.. from the root to monetized offerings
at least one descendant offering with a MONETIZES_VIA edge

result_shape.description: Number of distinct canonical revenue models recovered from descendant offerings

a valid descendant traversal via OFFERS*0.. from the root to monetized offerings

no revenue amount properties or financial metrics required
